tests.description: A `parallel` block inside a `fork(...) as item { ... }` body. Each fork branch independently desugars its own parallel block. Confirms suffix uniqueness across nested fork iterations and that the parallel's bindings hoist into the fork-body scope correctly so the trailing `return` sees them. The arms do not reference the outer fork's `item` because that is an unrelated pre-existing fork limitation (outer block args don't capture into inner fork closures).
